name: Table

aliases.name: Pipe
aliases.comment: Pipe for the table's messages to change the state.

values.name: dynamic
values.comment:
Define a configuration for a table with dynamic data (i.e. with paginated
loaded data).
values.type: (Table.Model a -> msg) -> (Table.Model a -> msg) -> (a -> String.String) -> List.List (Table.Column a msg) -> Table.Config a () msg

values.name: init
values.type: Table.Config a b msg -> Table.Model a

values.name: loaded
values.comment:
Load the data in the model with the total number of rows if the data are
incomplete.
values.type: Table.Model a -> List.List a -> Basics.Int -> Table.Model a

values.name: loadedDynamic
values.comment:
Similar to `loaded`. Load partial data in the model and specified the total
number of rows.
values.type: List.List a -> Basics.Int -> Table.Model a -> Table.Model a

values.name: loadedStatic
values.comment: Similar to `loaded` with all data so `List.length rows == total`.
values.type: List.List a -> Table.Model a -> Table.Model a

values.name: pagination
values.comment: Get the pagination values from model.

values.name: selected
values.comment: Return the list of selected rows.

values.name: static
values.comment:
Define a configuration for a table with static data (i.e. with all loaded
data at once).
values.type: (Table.Model a -> msg) -> (a -> String.String) -> List.List (Table.Column a msg) -> Table.Config a () msg

values.name: subSelected
values.comment: Return the list of selected rows in the sub tables.

values.name: subscriptions
values.type: Table.Config a b msg -> Table.Model a -> Platform.Sub.Sub msg

values.name: view
values.type: Table.Config a b msg -> Table.Model a -> Html.Html msg
